meaning: n.居住者,生活优裕的人,肝脏
examples: The largest organ in the body is the liver.
The drug can cause inflammation of the liver.
She was on a wait list for a liver transplant.
The excess insulin triggers the liver to produce an overabundance of triglycerides, which gum up already-narrow arteries.
Alas, in late August Eric's U.S. doctors found, as predicted, a tumor on his new liver.
